title: Repository Layout Restructure and Archive Migration
summary: This feature completed the repository topology migration to the post-restructure layout. The canonical archive tree now lives under .pan/archive/, active run workspaces live under .pan/work/, and the source tree has been consolidated under lib/. The delivery also retired the -standard and -complex agent variants…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, ship artifacts, and implementation surface. After human accepts this index artifact, run pan advance to complete, then delegate the generated complete-stage prompt for…
review.spec_contracts_note: No contracts/ directory under feature folder; review used behavioral delta coverage only.
intake.human_approval_note: Spec ratified at plan advance per state.json advanceHistory intake→plan event.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
